name: Collected Company
oracle_text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
design_notes: A powerful rare instant that demonstrates green's creature-centric identity. Shows the template for library-searching effects: look, select, put onto battlefield, then handle the rest. The restriction (creatures with mana value 3 or less) is a deckbuilding constraint that creates interesting decisions. Being an instant means you can deploy creatures at end of opponent's turn — a strong tempo play. Teaches how rares can enable entire deck archetypes.
